name: Medaillons of Pork Tenderloin Veronique
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork tenderloin, cut into 3-ounce portions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork tenderloin into 3-ounce portions and season with salt and white pepper. Sauté in butter, then remove from the pan and set aside while keeping it hot.
2. In the same pan, add more butter and sauté the shallots for two minutes. Add veal stock and sherry wine, bring to a boil, and scrape the bottom of the pan to dissolve all drippings from the tenderloins. Reduce the sauce to half its volume.
3. Add heavy cream, stir well, and bring to a boil. Strain the sauce into another clean pan. Place the medallions in the sauce. If the sauce is too thin, thicken it with cornstarch.
4. Sauté seedless grapes in butter. Arrange 2 medallions on each dinner plate, top with 4-5 seedless grapes, and pour 2 ounces of sauce over them. Garnish with parsley.
